Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(d\); const s=j.question.understand.visual_svg; console.log\(s\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(d\); const s=j.question.understand.visual_svg; console.log\(s.match\(/<svg[^>]*>/i\)[0]\)}\)")

PowerShell($pids = \(netstat -ano | Select-String ":3000 "\).ForEach\({ \($_ -split '\\s+'\)[-1] }\) | Sort-Object -Unique; foreach \($p in $pids\) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Host "Killed PIDs: $\($pids -join ', '\)")

'EXISTS_NONEMPTY' : 'EXISTS_EMPTY'\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('MISSING_OR_INVALID: ' + e.message\); }")

Bash(node -e "try { const fs=require\('fs'\); const p='e:/Swaseekh-main/Swaseekh-main/scripts/data/answers/ch3.json'; if\(!fs.existsSync\(p\)\){console.log\('NOEXIST'\);process.exit\(0\);} const j=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(p,'utf8'\)\); if\(j && typeof j==='object' && !Array.isArray\(j\) && Object.keys\(j\).length>0\){console.log\('NONEMPTY:'+Object.keys\(j\).length\);} else {console.log\('EMPTY'\);} } catch\(e\){ console.log\('PARSEFAIL:'+e.message\); }")
